# Copilot Instructions

See `AGENTS.md` at the repo root — that file is the canonical entry point for all AI agents in this repo. It covers the doc read order, branch naming, build/deploy loop, log verification, and all established conventions.

The `.github/instructions/cmdpal-extension.instructions.md` file contains a useful SDK reference for Command Palette page types, commands, and content types. Read `AGENTS.md` first for project-specific rules, then consult that file for SDK API details.
